entity.summary: Cosmos-ecosystem automated-market-maker decentralized exchange supporting swaps and liquidity pools across XPLA and Fetch.ai networks.
entity.notes: Current first-party web-application source code was updated in April 2026 and defines supported XPLA and Fetch.ai networks, mainnet factory and router contracts, and live dezswap.io API endpoints. The public homepage was not independently fetched in this review, so URL status remains live_unverified while the entity status is active based on current first-party code and registry corroboration.

evidence.title: Dezswap web application network and contract configuration
evidence.notes: Current first-party application code defines XPLA and Fetch.ai support, mainnet factory and router contracts, and dezswap.io API endpoints, supporting active exchange classification.

evidence.title: Dezswap exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Entity-specific exchange registry entry independently preserves Dezswap under the dezswap.io domain.
